title: Section 51
content: Without prejudice to anything contained in section 50, the 1[Central Government] may at any time appoint the 2[Comptroller and Auditor-General] 3*** to examine and report upon the accounts of the Bank.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the M.O. 1937, for "G.G. in C.". 2. Subs. by Act 32 of 1951, s. 18, for "Auditor General" (w.e.f. 1-11-1951). 3. The words "or such auditors as it thinks fit" omitted by Act 62 of 1948, s. 7 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 1-1-1949).
